title: Founding Generalist
must_haves: Work directly with Founder across HR, commercial, ops, finance, legal, revops, investor relations (MEETS: FA at Minima covered ops/fundraising/IR)
Build foundations to scale team — hiring, internal systems, ops (MEETS: scaled 1->30, cross-functional execution)
Deploy and manage AI agents/tools for operational efficiency (MEETS strongly: builds AI agents with Claude Code)
Bias for action / ambiguity comfort (MEETS: turned ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams)
hard_blockers: Domain is climate/decarbonisation deep-tech (Cambridge Engineering spinout) — not crypto/Web3 but not a hard gate for a generalist role
Cambridge-based (Ryan currently Cambridge, relocating to London — actually a plus for this one)
met_strengths: Textbook founding-generalist / FA fit — investor relations, fundraising support, ops, cross-functional execution
AI-agent deployment is an explicit ask and a core Ryan strength
Cambridge location aligns (he is currently Cambridge-based)
one_line_verdict: Strong founding-generalist match on responsibilities and AI-agent ask; held back from Strong only by climate-domain (vs crypto) and very modest pay band.
fetch_note: Open via Workable (apply.workable.com/neutreeno). Neutreeno = Cambridge University Engineering spinout, decarbonisation software. Role works directly with Founder + Ops/Finance Lead, explicitly deploying AI agents. HQ at Cambridge Institute for Sustainability Leadership.
